import bisect

def solve(s: str, order: list[int], k: int) -> int:
    n = len(s)
    total_substrings = n * (n + 1) // 2
    blocked = []
    total_non_star = total_substrings
    for t in range(n):

        it = bisect.bisect_left(blocked, x)
        predecessor = -1
        if it > 0:
            predecessor = blocked[it-1]
        successor = n
        if it < len(blocked):
            successor = blocked[it]
        left = predecessor + 1
        right = successor - 1
        old_contribution = 0
        if left <= right:
            old_contribution = (right - left + 1) * (right - left + 2) // 2
        new_length1 = x - left
        new_length2 = right - x
        new_contribution = 0
        if new_length1 >= 0:
            new_contribution += new_length1 * (new_length1 + 1) // 2
        if new_length2 >= 0:
            new_contribution += new_length2 * (new_length2 + 1) // 2
        total_non_star = total_non_star - old_contribution + new_contribution
        bisect.insort(blocked, x)
        valid_count = total_substrings - total_non_star
        if valid_count >= k:

    return -1

import bisect

def solve(s: str, order: list[int], k: int) -> int:

    total_substrings = n * (n + 1) // 2

    total_non_star = total_substrings

        new_length1 = x - left

import bisect

def solve(s: str, order: list[int], k: int) -> int:
    n = len(s)
    total_substrings = n * (n + 1) // 2
    blocked = []
    total_non_star = total_substrings
    for t in range(n):
        x = order[t]
        insertion_point = bisect.bisect_left(blocked, x)
        predecessor = blocked[insertion_point - 1] if insertion_point > 0 else -1
        successor = blocked[insertion_point] if insertion_point < len(blocked) else n
        length = successor - predecessor - 1
        old_contribution = (length * (length + 1)) // 2 if length >= 0 else 0
        left_length = x - predecessor - 1
        right_length = successor - x - 1
        new_contribution = 0
        if left_length >= 0:
            new_contribution += (left_length * (left_length + 1)) // 2
        if right_length >= 0:
            new_contribution += (right_length * (right_length + 1)) // 2
        total_non_star -= old_contribution
        total_non_star += new_contribution
        bisect.insort(blocked, x)
        valid_count = total_substrings - total_non_star
        if valid_count >= k:
            return t
    return -1
```

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;

long long solve(std::string s, std::vector<long long> order, long long k) {
    int n = s.length();
    long long total_substrings = n * (n + 1) / 2;
    set<int> blocked;
    long long total_non_star = total_substrings;
    for (int t = 0; t < n; ++t) {
        int x = order[t];
        // Find predecessor and successor
        auto it = blocked.lower_bound(x);
        int predecessor = -1;
        if (it != blocked.begin()) {
            predecessor = *(--it);
        }
        int successor = n;
        if (it != blocked.end()) {
            successor = *it;
        }
        int left = predecessor + 1;
        int right = successor - 1;
        long long old_contribution = 0;
        if (left <= right) {
            int length = right - left + 1;
            old_contribution = length * (length + 1) / 2;
        }
        // Compute new contribution
        long long new_contribution = 0;
        int new_length1 = x - left;
        int new_length2 = right - x;
        if (new_length1 >= 0) {
            new_contribution += new_length1 * (new_length1 + 1) / 2;
        }
        if (new_length2 >= 0) {
            new_contribution += new_length2 * (new_length2 + 1) / 2;
        }
        total_non_star = total_non_star - old_contribution + new_contribution;
        // Add x to blocked
        blocked.insert(x);
        // Check if valid
        long long valid_count = total_substrings - total_non_star;
        if (valid_count >= k) {

        }
